creator: johntdarrah@gmail.com
text:
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/zfs/#zfs-zpool-create

In section 20.3.1:

"Creating a ZFS storage pool (zpool) requires permanent decisions, as the pool structure cannot change after creation."

Should read:

"Creating a ZFS storage pools requires permanent decisions, as the pool structure cannot change after creation."

Is this a correct way to word the sentence?
